sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71988" key="o)gkwtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀγκ-ωτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, τῶν πραγμάτων</foreign> dub. l. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.164.17</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐγκοπτικός</foreign> Kroll).</entryFree>
